## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Shell syntax checks for modified shell scripts
- [ ] English and Chinese docs updated together, if user-facing docs changed
- [ ] No official Synology packages, generated packages, extracted binaries, credentials, tokens, certificates, or unredacted logs are included

## Notes

Link any related issue or validation result.
